name: /postmortem --dry-run short-circuits before any test or spec is written per the §2.14 cross-cutting dry-run contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/postmortem.sh" 'sample defect' --emit-test --dry-run 2>err.txt && [ ! -d tests ] && [ ! -f FAILURE-LOG.md ] && grep -q 'dry-run' err.txt && echo skipped 1>&2
